paragraphs.text: 中国茶道是一种以茶为媒介的生活礼仪和精神修养方式。
paragraphs.translation: This is an interesting article about Chinese culture.

paragraphs.text: 泡茶首先要选好茶叶和茶具，然后控制水温和泡茶时间。
paragraphs.translation: Reading this will help you learn more about China.

paragraphs.text: 朋友们聚在一起泡一壶好茶，边品茶边聊天，是非常惬意的事情。
paragraphs.translation: Keep reading and your Chinese will improve!
